title: Spain Housing
description: Spanish house prices (€/m²) and regional series from INE + Ministerio de Vivienda, by region and time.

list.name: map_indicator
list.label: Map metric
list.query: SELECT name AS __text, code AS __value FROM indicators WHERE category = 'price' ORDER BY name

list.name: ccaa
list.label: Autonomous community
list.query: SELECT name AS __text, code AS __value FROM regions WHERE level = 'ccaa' ORDER BY name

list.name: prov
list.label: Province
list.query: SELECT name AS __text, code AS __value FROM regions WHERE level = 'prov' AND parent_code = '$ccaa' ORDER BY name

list.name: region
list.label: Region
list.query:
SELECT name AS __text, code AS __value FROM regions WHERE level = 'ccaa' AND code = '$ccaa' AND '$level' = 'ccaa'
UNION ALL
SELECT name AS __text, code AS __value FROM regions WHERE level = 'prov' AND code = '$prov' AND '$level' = 'prov'

list.name: series
list.label: Series to compare
list.description: Pick one or more housing time series to plot together in the comparison panel.
list.query: SELECT name AS __text, code AS __value FROM indicators ORDER BY category, name

panels.title: $map_indicator by region — latest in range (click a region to filter)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT ON (region_code) ine_code, region_name, region_code, parent_code, value
FROM v_region_series
WHERE indicator = '$map_indicator'
  AND level = CASE WHEN '$level' = 'ccaa' THEN 'ccaa' ELSE 'prov' END
  AND $__timeFilter(period)
ORDER BY region_code, period DESC

panels.title: Housing series comparison — $region
panels.description: Plots every series chosen in the "Series to compare" selector for the selected region. Series can have different units (€/m², counts, index, years…); use the legend and tooltip values when comparing across units.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT period AS "time", indicator_name AS metric, value
FROM v_region_series
WHERE region_code = '$region'
  AND indicator IN (${series:singlequote})
  AND $__timeFilter(period)
ORDER BY period

SELECT DISTINCT ON (indicator) indicator_name AS "Indicator", category AS "Category",
       round(value, 2) AS "Value", unit AS "Unit", source AS "Source", period AS "As of"
FROM v_region_series
WHERE region_code = '$region' AND $__timeFilter(period)
ORDER BY indicator, period DESC
